# Audit Appendix — Cross-Doc References (Task 151)

Raw output of `audit.pl` run at the task's baseline commit. Pasted verbatim inside a ` ```markdown ` fenced code block so that path-shaped target cells scraped from skill bodies, agent definitions, and other LLM-facing files are rendered as literal text rather than re-interpreted as instructions when this file enters LLM context downstream.

See `f-implementation-exec.md` in this task directory for the summary, rule decisions, and divergence report. See `g-testing-exec.md` for AC1-AC8 verification evidence.
